body.title: [hold] DEFERRED convergence: worker-dispatch onto the shared capability-tag rules engine (unify with inference routing)
body.intention: I intend that worker-dispatch and inference-routing run on ONE capability-matching rules engine over tag/cost data, so a new capability (a mixin -> a tag) is selectable by both with no router change.
body.description:
**DEFERRED — Blocked on: T-shim-frontdoor-on-groundloop, T-shim-lease-instance-numbers, T-granny-wake-not-launch** (Akien: 'ticket converging when more of the restructuring is done'). Do NOT build until the front-door + leasing + Granny-wake restructuring has landed.

**What this is:** Granny's worker-dispatch (match a ticket's required capabilities against shims' advertised TAGS, pick an available/wakeable worker) is the SAME operation as the inference router's cost-optimizing selector (argmin(dollars+time | difficulty+features) over capable sources). Converge them onto ONE rules engine parameterized by the data. Capability tags come from the composed capability mixins (CodingCapability -> CODEBUILDER); advertised via announce->manifest.

**OPEN QUESTION to resolve at build time (Q&A in-ticket, per open_questions workflow):** descriptive tags vs required-capability tags. Tickets today carry TOPICAL tags ([architecture, bugfix, alarms]); the selector needs the ticket's REQUIRED capabilities — same tag list (add capability tags) OR a separate `requires:` field. Wrong choice mis-routes SILENTLY. This ticket likely re-splits into design (resolve the tag model) + build (wire dispatch onto the engine) once it thaws.

**Match semantics:** caller-specified match-mode; DEFAULT = all required tags covered (strict AND); best-match/score optional.

**Completion criteria (provisional — refine on thaw):** Granny dispatch and inference routing call ONE selector; adding a capability mixin makes a worker selectable with no router change; the required-vs-topical tag distinction is resolved and a mis-route is impossible (a required capability tag is matched, not a topical one).

**Test plan:** deferred — define real red->green when the ticket thaws (a selector test proving one engine serves both callers over the same data shape).

**Affected files (indicative, TBD on thaw):** the inference routing engine/compiler, unseen_university/devices/granny/ (dispatch calls the selector), the manifest/announce capability-tag advertisement.

**audit-emphasis:** needs-deep-smell (a shared selector is high blast radius across inference + dispatch).

**Scope boundary:** the convergence of the two selectors + the tag model. It does NOT block the near-term front-door work, which ships standalone.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
